title: Pan Seared Roman Chicken Pasta
description: A low calorie Italian dish featuring allspice and chicken, cooked to perfection in a tandoor clay pot, resulting in a fresh and glassy jelly texture, perfect for a romantic evening
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the tandoor clay pot over medium heat
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside
Add the cherry tomatoes to the pot and cook for 2 minutes until they start to release their juices
Add the allspice, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine
Add the pasta to the pot and stir to combine with the tomato mixture
Return the chicken to the pot and stir to combine with the pasta and tomato mixture
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes until the pasta is al dente
Stir in the chopped fresh basil and grated parmesan cheese
